# Upstream Copilot CLI JSON Schemas

These files are fetched verbatim from the `@github/copilot-linux-x64` npm package at the version pinned in `.copilot-schema-version`.

**Do not edit by hand.** To update, run `bb schemas:fetch` after bumping `.copilot-schema-version`.

Currently pinned version: `1.0.71-2`
